{{Quote|The New Republic pushed Pellaeon back, but suffered a grave defeat in the Battle of Orinda. There, the ''Reaper'' destroyed most of Antilles's starfighters by annihilating the ﬂeet carrier ''Endurance''.|[[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]], about the [[Orinda campaign]]|<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Endurance''''' was an [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]] in service to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Defense Force]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. [[Commander/Legends|Commanded]] by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Areta Bell]], the ''Endurance'' was dispatched to assist [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' in opposing [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Admiral [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon's]] [[Orinda campaign|capture]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orinda/Legends|Orinda]] and six other [[Star system/Legends|systems]] along the [[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. The ''Endurance'' [[Battle of Obredaan|fought]] alongside the ''Lusankya'' at [[Obredaan]], eventually forcing a [[Battle of Orinda|confrontation]] with Pellaeon's forces—led by the ''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought ''[[Reaper]]''—at Orinda.

During the [[Space warfare/Legends|battle]], Bell refused to launch the ''Endurance''{{'s}} [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighters]] until the ''Reaper''{{'s}} defenses had been sufficiently weakened to allow for a [[Starfighter combat/Legends|pinpoint tactical strike]] by her [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]]. However, Pellaeon sprung a trap at Orinda using six [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictors]] and the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] [[Dominion (Star Dreadnought)|''Dominion'']], commanded by Admiral [[Teren Rogriss]]. The ''Endurance'' was caught between the firepower of the two Imperial Star Dreadnoughts, and was swiftly destroyed with the [[Death/Legends|loss]] of all hands.

==Description==
The ''Endurance'' was an [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]]<ref name="EGTW" /> manufactured by the [[Republic Engineering Corporation]]. Measuring 1,040 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] from stem to stern, the ''Endurance''-class was a dedicated [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]] capable of carrying two full [[Fighter wing/Legends|wings]] of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]];<ref name="CTD" /> the ''Endurance''{{'s}} complement was comprised of [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of new [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighters]].<ref name="EGTW" /> The ''Endurance'' was armed with twelve [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] [[Cannon/Legends|cannons]], twenty [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], and eight [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], with four [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors for retrieval operations. The vessel was also equipped with [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]],<ref name="CTD" /> but they were not powerful enough to stand up to the firepower of a [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]].<ref name="EGTW" />

Equipped with a Class One [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and a Class Ten back up, the ''Endurance'' was able to traverse [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] quickly and had a top speed of 1,000 [[Kilometer/Legends|km]]/[[Standard hour/Legends|h]] in [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]].<ref name="CTD" /> Commanded by<ref name="EGTW" /> veteran [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic naval]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]]<ref name="Isard">''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''</ref> [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Areta Bell]], the ''Endurance'' could support a crew of 6,795 beings, but could be manned by a skeleton crew of only 2,265. The carrier's weapons systems required a [[Gunner/Legends|gunnery]] crew of seventy-six, and the ''Endurance'' had room to carry 1,600 [[Soldier/Legends|troops]]. The ''Endurance''{{'s}} cargo capacity was 15,000 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]], and the carrier could carry consumables to sustain the crew for five [[Standard month/Legends|months]].<ref name="CTD" />

==History==
===Orinda campaign===
In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], Admiral [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] launched a [[Orinda campaign|campaign]] against the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orinda/Legends|Orinda]],<ref name="EGTW" /> in the [[Irishi sector/Legends|Irishi sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]],<ref name="TEA-OC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> capturing the planet and six [[Core Worlds/Legends|Coreward]] [[Star system/Legends|systems]] along the [[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]] as far as [[Lonnaw]] as a show of Imperial power. At the head of his force was the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Reaper]]''. Orinda was targeted as it had previously been the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the Empire from the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|fall]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to just after [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|defeat]] at [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi]]. Pellaeon dispatched emissaries to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] at [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] with the message that the Empire had retaken a culturally significant world and had secured their borders. If the New Republic respected the Empire's claim, then further offensives would not take place. Pellaeon's entreaties were genuine, but the New Republic, fearful of a renewed Imperial offensive on the Core, dispatched a force led by the ''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' and including [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to retake the captured territory, under the [[Commander/Legends|command]] of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]].<ref name="EGTW" />

Antilles' and Pellaeon's forces clashed throughout the Mid Rim in a series of battles as Rogue Squadron [[Starfighter combat/Legends|dueled]] with [[Turr Phennir]]'s elite [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]]. While [[Media/Legends|media]] reports captivated citizens across both the New Republic and Empire, the leaders of the New Republic's [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Defense Force]] made the decision to reinforce Antilles with the ''Endurance'', commanded by Admiral Bell and loaded with squadrons of E-wings. [[Fleet Command (New Republic)/Legends|Naval Command]] was less than enthused that a major campaign was being fought between two Star Dreadnoughts when their own doctrine had focused on the superiority of starfighters and smaller [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], and Bell was under pressure to prove that starfighters—especially the new E-wings—were still the dominant force in [[Space warfare/Legends|space warfare]]. The ''Endurance'' was dispatched from the [[Drearia system/Legends|Drearia system]] on the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]], taking a route that took the vessel through [[Walin'or]] and Ord Mantell before hooking up with the ''Lusankya''.<ref name="EGTW" />

[[File:LusankyavsReaper-EGW.jpg|thumb|left|The Battle of Orinda, in which the ''Endurance'' took part]]
Antilles and Bell forced Pellaeon to fall back, winning a [[Battle of Obredaan|battle]] at [[Obredaan]] before forcing a [[Battle of Orinda|confrontation]] at Orinda. As the ''Lusankya'' and ''Reaper'' traded broadsides, Antilles needed Bell to launch her fighters and have them join the fray. Bell, however, refused. Her squadrons had been plagued by mechanical failure, and the E-wings were designed for precision attacks, not combat against a large capital [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. She promised that once the ''Reaper'' was vulnerable, she would launch her squadrons. Pellaeon, however, had other ideas. At his signal, six [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictors]] dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], trapping the New Republic force in the [[Orinda system/Legends|system]]. They were followed by another Star Dreadnought, the [[Dominion (Star Dreadnought)|''Dominion'']], under the command of Admiral [[Teren Rogriss]]. The New Republic was unaware of the existence of the ''Dominion''—Pellaeon had discovered it hidden in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] alongside the ''[[Megador]]'' and had kept both vessels hidden from the New Republic—and its arrival tipped the balance at Orinda. Caught between the firepower of the ''Reaper'' and the ''Dominion'', the ''Lusankya'' was forced to retreat. The ''Endurance''{{'s}} shields were quickly overcome by the combined might of the two Star Dreadnoughts and the carrier was lost with all hands and all fighters still in the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]]. Rogue Squadron was able to punch a hole in the Imperial Interdictor screen which allowed the ''Lusankya'' to escape, leaving Orinda in Imperial hands.<ref name="EGTW" />

===Legacy===
The destruction of the ''Endurance'' had a lasting effect on New Republic military doctrine. After Orinda, fleet carriers launched all their starfighters upon entering an engagement zone to reduce the risk of losing a full-loaded vessel.<ref name="BTS" />

==Commanders and crew==
The ''Endurance'' was commanded by Admiral Bell,<ref name="EGTW" /> a veteran officer of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and its successor state, the New Republic. She had commanded the [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] [[Dutyfree/Legends|''Dutyfree'']] during the Alliance's [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|evacuation]] from [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], and the [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Swift Liberty]]'' during the New Republic's [[Battle of Liinade III|campaign]] against [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]]'s [[Ciutric Hegemony]].<ref name="Isard" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Endurance'' was first mentioned in ''[[Before the Storm]]'', the first book of ''[[The Black Fleet Crisis]]'' by [[Michael P. Kube-McDowell]] published in [[1996]].<ref name="BTS" /> The ''Endurance'' received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' published in [[2008]]. In the entry, the ''Endurance'' is referenced as being assigned to the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]];<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> however, since the Fifth was not inaugurated until [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], this article treats the reference as erroneous.<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the first part of ''[[Before the Storm]]'', and therefore the inauguration of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]], to [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].</ref> ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' states that Bell is the ''Endurance''{{'s}} commanding officer,<ref name="EGTW" /> but the commanding officer of the ''Endurance'' had been referred to as male in ''Before the Storm''.<ref name="BTS" />
